objective: Measure whether the global generated-component pattern limit is the main blocker for rpf50 mixed-hook exact support.
non_negotiables: This is a capacity-only diagnostic and must not be treated as selected exact support.
Bounded and unbounded source variants must be compared against the 150-row rpf50 target.
Any unbounded improvement must be recorded with whether it actually clears rpf50.
No exact shard or model claim can be promoted from this report alone.

tasks.prompt: Add and run a capacity-only pattern-limit atlas for bounded and unbounded mixed-hook source combinations.
acceptance: The report is capacity-only for every source.
Bounded expanded source capacity is recorded.
Docs state whether unbounded capacity reaches the 150-row rpf50 target.

tasks.prompt: Record Wave 60 as a pattern-limit capacity diagnostic and keep exact-support claims blocked unless rpf50 capacity clears 150.
commands: python3 -m py_compile engine/ml_model.py engine/test.py agents/network.py agents/label_schema.py
acceptance: Docs state that bounded expanded capacity is 125.
Docs state that unbounded expanded-plus-interior capacity is 129.
Docs state that unbounded capacity remains below the 150-row rpf50 target.
Docs route next work toward genuinely new value supply, not just pattern-limit tuning.

integration_gates.command: python3 agents/network.py validate && python3 agents/network.py validate-wave agents/waves/wave_60_pattern_limit_source_atlas.json
integration_gates.success_signal: The Wave 60 plan is internally consistent.
The Wave 60 pattern-limit atlas is valid JSON.
